expectations.text: Lists at least 3 automatically handled criteria (e.g., 4.1.2, 2.5.2, 2.1.1)
Lists 1.1.1 (Non-text Content) as requiring manual implementation
Lists criteria that DON'T apply to native iOS apps (e.g., 4.1.1 Parsing, 2.4.1 Bypass Blocks)
Identifies at least one WCAG 2.2 NEW criterion (2.5.7, 2.5.8, 3.3.7, or 3.3.8)
